text: 📝 «Пустая угроза» 📝 Почти 100 российских кораблей прошли британские воды Месяц назад Кир Стармер торжественно объявил: британские военные отныне вправе задерживать и досматривать суда российского «теневого флота» прямо в территориальных водах. Заголовки вышли громкие. Реакция тоже последовала незамедлительно — но совсем не та , на которую, видимо, рассчитывали в Лондоне. Через две недели российский фрегат «Адмирал Григорович» прошёл вдоль южного побережья Англии, конвоируя два подсанкционных танкера — Universal и Enigma — прямо через Ла-Манш . Королевский флот просто наблюдал. Никаких попыток остановить конвой не предпринималось. Журналисты The Telegraph следили за ним с борта судна у берегов Дувра — и написали, что это выглядело как демонстративный ответ на угрозы премьера. Это был точный сигнал: с боевым кораблём прикрытия расклад выглядит совсем иначе. Одно дело — высаживать досмотровую группу на торговое судно без защиты. Другое — принимать решение об инциденте с военным кораблём страны, располагающей ядерным оружием. 🖍 С тех пор картина не изменилась. За месяц после заявления Стармера через британские воды прошли уже как минимум 98 подсанкционных российских судов — примерно столько же, сколько в каждый из трёх предыдущих месяцев. Разумеется, это стало поводом для давления и критики: аналитик Atlantic Council Элизабет Брау прямо сказала, что многие пришли к выводу о «пустой угрозе». 🚩 Причины лежат на поверхности. У Британии нет специализированной береговой охраны с правоохранительными полномочиями, как у Франции или Швеции . Флот — самый малочисленный с XVII века и одновременно занят на нескольких направлениях. Поэтому юридические и экономические издержки пока перевешивают желание Стармера показать зубы . Хотя с ростом давления и критики это вполне может измениться. 📌 И здесь важно вернуться к недавнему эпизоду с проходом конвоя через Ла-Манш. Сам факт того, что один фрегат в сопровождении двух танкеров снизил готовность британцев действовать, — это яркое подтверждение тезиса: даже минимального сигнала о сопротивлении оказывается достаточно, чтобы остановить западную сторону. Британцы не решились на инцидент с «Адмиралом Григоровичем» — хотя без конвоя, возможно, и рискнули бы остановить один из танкеров для имитации жёсткости. ❗️ Но уроки и сигналы очень быстро забываются. Поэтому практику конвоирования нужно не только сохранять, но и системно расширять . Охватывать другие маршруты — не только Ла-Манш, но и воды Балтики, Северного моря, Средиземноморья, где французские и скандинавские патрули активно работают с «теневым флотом». Задействовать безэкипажные катера там, где боевых кораблей не хватает. Рассматривать асимметричные варианты давления на тех, кто всерьёз захочет проверить российские суда. #Великобритания #Россия ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ ОК | ✉️ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 “空洞的威胁” 📝 近100艘俄罗斯船只通过英国水域。一个月前，基尔·斯塔默郑重宣布：英国军方今后有权在领海内扣押和搜查俄罗斯“影子舰队”的船只。标题非常响亮。随后的反应也很快——但显然不是伦敦方面所预期的那样。两周后，俄罗斯“格里戈罗维奇海军上将”号护卫舰沿英格兰南海岸航行，护送两艘受制裁的油轮——Universal号和Enigma号——直接穿过英吉利海峡。皇家海军只是在旁观察。没有采取任何拦截护航编队的尝试。《每日电讯报》的记者在多佛海岸的船上对其进行了跟踪，并写道，这看起来是对首相威胁的示威性回应。这是一个明确的信号：有了护航战舰，情况就完全不同了。在没有保护的情况下登上商船搜查是一回事，而决定与一个拥有核武器国家的军舰发生冲突则是另一回事。 🖍 从那时起，情况没有改变。在斯塔默发表声明后的一个月里，至少有98艘受制裁的俄罗斯船只通过了英国水域——这与前三个月每个月的情况大致相同。当然，这引起了压力和批评：大西洋理事会的分析师伊丽莎白·布劳直言不讳地说，许多人得出了这是“空洞威胁”的结论。 🚩 原因显而易见。英国没有像法国或瑞典那样拥有执法权的专业海岸警卫队。其海军是自17世纪以来规模最小的，且同时在多个方向上执行任务。因此，法律和经济成本目前超过了斯塔默想要“展示牙齿”的愿望。尽管随着压力和批评的增加，这种情况很可能会改变。 📌 这里有必要回顾一下最近护航编队通过英吉利海峡的事件。一艘护卫舰护送两艘油轮的事实降低了英国人的行动意愿，这有力地证实了一个论点：即使是最小的抵抗信号也足以阻止西方。英国人不敢与“格里戈罗维奇海军上将”号发生冲突——尽管如果没有护航，他们或许会冒险拦截其中一艘油轮以展示强硬。 ❗️ 但教训和信号很快就会被遗忘。因此，护航的做法不仅需要保留，还需要系统性地扩大。覆盖其他路线——不仅是英吉利海峡，还有波罗的海、北海、地中海水域，法国和斯堪的纳维亚的巡逻队在那里积极应对“影子舰队”。在战舰不足的地方使用无人艇。考虑对那些认真想要检查俄罗斯船只的人采取不对称的施压方案。 #英国 #俄罗斯 ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇭🇺 FT : The European Commission is negotiating with Hungary’s incoming prime minister, Péter Magyar, on a workaround to keep part of €10 billion in frozen Covid‑19 recovery funds available beyond an August deadline. The funds were frozen over rule‑of‑law concerns during Viktor Orbán’s administration. Magyar is set to meet EU Commission President Ursula von der Leyen to discuss channelling part of the money to Hungary’s national development bank. Brussels sees his election as an opportunity to reset relations with Budapest. The recovery funds are part of a larger €30 billion package of frozen EU money and defence loans. Hungary’s original recovery plan, which included 27 “super‑milestones” on anti‑corruption, is no longer achievable by August. Officials are considering rewriting the plan, replacing some requirements with reforms that can be passed within the timeline. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇭🇺 金融时报：欧盟委员会正在与匈牙利候任总理彼得·马扎尔进行谈判，寻求一种变通方案，以保留部分在8月截止日期后仍可使用的100亿欧元被冻结的Covid-19复苏基金。这些资金在维克托·欧尔班政府期间因法治问题被冻结。马扎尔计划会见欧盟委员会主席乌尔苏拉·冯德莱恩，讨论将部分资金转入匈牙利国家开发银行。布鲁塞尔将他的当选视为重置与布达佩斯关系的机会。这些复苏基金是总额300亿欧元被冻结的欧盟资金和国防贷款的一部分。匈牙利最初的复苏计划包括27个关于反腐败的“超级里程碑”，目前已无法在8月前实现。官员们正在考虑重写该计划，用可以在规定时间内通过的改革来取代一些要求。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel I think Israel could have handled the Ukraine situation better. If it is true that Israel is buying grain from Russia’s occupied areas of Ukraine, Israel should have simply responded: thank you for flagging this, we are looking into it and it will be addressed. Even if Ukraine raised it through Twitter and not in the best way, and even if Ukraine does not publicly call out other countries like Egypt for buying sanctioned Russian grain, Israel could have been the grown up in the room and said: no worries, we got it, we are on it. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：我认为以色列本可以更好地处理乌克兰局势。如果以色列确实在从俄罗斯占领的乌克兰地区购买谷物，以色列本应简单地回应：感谢提醒，我们正在调查此事，并将予以解决。即使乌克兰是通过推特而不是以最好的方式提出这个问题，即使乌克兰没有公开点名其他购买受制裁俄罗斯谷物的国家（如埃及），以色列本可以表现得成熟一些，说：别担心，我们知道了，我们正在处理。推文

text: An Israeli military unit that assaulted and detained a CNN team in the West Bank has returned to duty after a one-month suspension. The incident involved a soldier putting a journalist in a chokehold; an investigation was opened, but no further discipline is known. Source: CNN

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 🇺🇦 King Charles III: 📌 “American leadership played a decisive role in rebuilding a devastated continent and defending freedom in Europe. We — and I personally — will never forget that, especially now as freedom is once again under attack following Russia’s invasion of Ukraine.” 📌 “In the aftermath of 9/11, when NATO invoked Article 5 for the first time and the UN Security Council stood united against terrorism, we responded together — just as our nations have done for over a century. Side by side in two world wars, the Cold War, Afghanistan, and in defining moments for our shared security.” 📌 “That same unwavering resolve is needed today to defend Ukraine and its brave people. The bond between the United States and the United Kingdom is invaluable and enduring — it is irreplaceable and indivisible.” Video is generated by grok AI tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：🇺🇸 🇺🇦 查尔斯三世国王：📌 “美国在重建饱受蹂躏的大陆和捍卫欧洲自由方面发挥了决定性作用。我们——包括我个人——永远不会忘记这一点，尤其是在俄罗斯入侵乌克兰后，自由再次受到攻击的今天。” 📌 “在9/11事件之后，当北约首次援引第五条款，联合国安理会团结一致反对恐怖主义时，我们共同做出了回应——正如我们的国家一个多世纪以来所做的那样。在两次世界大战、冷战、阿富汗战争以及我们共同安全的决定性时刻，我们并肩作战。” 📌 “今天，捍卫乌克兰及其勇敢的人民同样需要这种坚定不移的决心。美英之间的纽带是无价且持久的——它是不可替代且不可分割的。” 视频由Grok AI生成 推文

text: Nuno Felix Finally. We should all get on the actionnof buying a ton of MdCN France is going to restart the production of its sea-launched cruise missile (MdCN) in order to face the rising threat of high intensity conflict, especially in Europe. This was expected as the update of the "military programing law" (LPM) requests an increase of +170% in 2035 (and +85% in 2030) for this ammunition, compare to the previous version of the law. This includes both the air-launched (SCALP-EG) and sea-launched (MdCN) version of the cruise missile. The exact number of missiles being ordered remains classified. As a reminder, MdCN is similar to the US Tomahawk and can be launched both by surface ships and by submarines. It is subsonic and has an approx. 1000 km range. Info: @_lemarin 📸 : MdCN launched by a Suffren-class SSN in Apr. 2024 - @MarineNationale - Etienne Marcuz tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 终于。我们都应该行动起来，购买大量的MdCN。法国将重启其海基巡航导弹（MdCN）的生产，以应对高强度冲突日益增长的威胁，特别是在欧洲。这是意料之中的，因为“军事规划法”（LPM）的更新要求到2035年该弹药产量增加+170%（2030年增加+85%），与该法律的先前版本相比。这包括空射（SCALP-EG）和海基（MdCN）版本的巡航导弹。订购的导弹确切数量仍属机密。提醒一下，MdCN类似于美国的战斧导弹，既可以由水面舰艇发射，也可以由潜艇发射。它是亚音速的，射程约为1000公里。信息来源：@_lemarin 📸：2024年4月由苏弗朗级核潜艇发射的MdCN - @MarineNationale - Etienne Marcuz 推文

text: Nuno Felix Repeat after me: there is no geopolitical isolation for the 2nd economy in the world. How will Europe face the prospect of geopolitical isolation? 🇪🇺 We are pleased to welcome Ignacy Niemczycki (@ignacyn), Secretary of State at the Ministry of Foreign Affairs (@PolandMFA), to Session I of #StrategicArk 2026. In the face of a potential "Great Transatlantic Divide", Minister Niemczycki will offer crucial insights into European autonomy and the future of the Western alliance. 📍 Warsaw | May 12-13 Full agenda & registration → http://pism.pl/strategic-ark-2026 📺 Watch live on YouTube → http://youtube.com/@PolandPISM #PISM #GlobalSecurity #StrategicArk #Transatlantic #Europe #ForeignPolicy - PISM Strategic Ark tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 再跟我念一遍：世界第二大经济体不存在地缘政治孤立。欧洲将如何面对地缘政治孤立的前景？🇪🇺 我们很高兴欢迎波兰外交部（@PolandMFA）国务秘书Ignacy Niemczycki（@ignacyn）参加#StrategicArk 2026第一场会议。面对潜在的“大跨大西洋分歧”，Niemczycki部长将就欧洲自主权和西方联盟的未来提供关键见解。📍 华沙 | 5月12-13日 完整议程及注册 → http://pism.pl/strategic-ark-2026 📺 YouTube直播 → http://youtube.com/@PolandPISM #PISM #全球安全 #StrategicArk #跨大西洋 #欧洲 #外交政策 - PISM Strategic Ark 推文

text: Mathias Döpfner, CEO of Axel Springer, told Politico staff that company values—especially support for Israel—are non-negotiable. He suggested employees who don’t align should leave: “If the essentials are not a reason why to work for this company, I can only recommend to work for other companies.”
text_zh: 阿克塞尔·斯普林格公司首席执行官马蒂亚斯·多夫纳告诉Politico员工，公司价值观——尤其是对以色列的支持——是不容谈判的。他暗示不认同的员工应该离开：“如果这些基本原则不是为这家公司工作的理由，我只能建议去其他公司工作。”

text: Germany’s top military cyber official rejects Palantir for now over data control concerns. Vice Admiral Thomas Daum: I don’t see that happening at all at the moment. It is inconceivable… to grant industry staff access to the national database.
text_zh: 德国最高军事网络官员因数据控制担忧暂时拒绝使用Palantir。海军中将托马斯·道姆：目前我根本看不到这种情况发生。让行业人员访问国家数据库是不可想象的。

text: 🇬🇧 🇺🇸 ⚡️ King Charles Lies to Epstein Survivors After Refusing to Meet Them 🔹 King Charles III refused to meet in person with Jeffrey Epstein’s victims before his speech to the US Congress, drawing criticism from lawmakers and survivors. 🔹 Rep. Ro Khanna invited the King to meet the victims, saying it would signal accountability and justice. The request was rejected, but the King was expected to mention the issue in his address. 🔹 However, in his speech, Charles made no direct reference to Epstein or the survivors, offering only a vague comment about supporting victims of social ills. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇬🇧 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 查尔斯国王在拒绝会见爱泼斯坦受害者后对他们撒谎 🔹 查尔斯三世国王在向美国国会发表演讲前拒绝亲自会见杰弗里·爱泼斯坦的受害者，引发了立法者和幸存者的批评。 🔹 众议员罗·康纳邀请国王会见受害者，称这将标志着问责和正义。该请求被拒绝，但预计国王会在演讲中提及此事。 🔹 然而，在演讲中，查尔斯没有直接提及爱泼斯坦或幸存者，只是含糊地表示支持社会弊病的受害者。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | 推广

text: Baraachit
text_zh: 巴拉奇特

text: After killing Lebanese army soldiers, Israel is now back at killing Syrians. The attack on a motorcycle in Chaaytieh town murdered a Syrian laborer. They targeted more than 3-5 vehicles today all randomly.
text_zh: 在杀害黎巴嫩士兵后，以色列现在又开始杀害叙利亚人。对查伊蒂耶镇一辆摩托车的袭击杀害了一名叙利亚劳工。他们今天随机袭击了超过3-5辆车。

text: ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇪🇺 FT : Germany’s defence budget is set to match the combined total of the UK and France by the end of the decade, with €779bn allocated between 2026 and 2030 – more than double the previous five years. By 2030, Berlin will surpass Nato’s goal of spending 3.5% of GDP on defence, with an annual budget reaching almost €190bn. The rearmament has raised concerns in Paris and Warsaw about industrial competition, German reliance on U.S. systems such as F‑35s and Patriots, and the potential erosion of European defence co‑operation. Franco‑German tensions have resurfaced over joint projects like the Future Combat Air System (FCAS) and Germany’s Sky Shield initiative, which excludes a Franco‑Italian alternative. While Chancellor Merz has vowed “partnership‑based leadership” and rejected “hegemonic fantasies”, officials in Paris fear that Berlin’s spending spree could lock in procurement choices for decades and boost German industry without guaranteeing a fair share for neighbours. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇪🇺 金融时报：德国的国防预算预计到本十年末将与英国和法国的总和相当，2026年至2030年间拨款7790亿欧元——是前五年的两倍多。到2030年，柏林将超过北约GDP 3.5%的国防支出目标，年度预算将达到近1900亿欧元。这种重整军备在巴黎和华沙引发了对工业竞争、德国对F-35和爱国者等美国系统的依赖以及欧洲国防合作可能受到侵蚀的担忧。法德在未来空战系统（FCAS）和德国排除法意替代方案的“天空之盾”倡议等联合项目上的紧张关系再次浮出水面。尽管默茨总理誓言要进行“基于伙伴关系的领导”并拒绝“霸权幻想”，但巴黎的官员担心柏林的支出狂潮可能会锁定未来几十年的采购选择，并在不保证邻国公平份额的情况下提振德国工业。@wfwitness

text: Iran’s IRGC claims it recovered and neutralized multiple U.S. bombs after recent strikes. They say they found “more than 15 heavy American missiles” in the south and ~55 more plus “thousands of bomblets” in another region. Most notably, they claim an intact bunker-buster (GBU-57) was recovered for “reverse engineering.”
text_zh: 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队声称在最近的袭击后回收并拆除了多枚美国炸弹。他们称在南部发现了“超过15枚重型美国导弹”，在另一个地区发现了约55枚导弹以及“数千枚子炸弹”。最值得注意的是，他们声称回收了一枚完好的掩体破坏弹（GBU-57）用于“逆向工程”。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Tasnim News Agency: Armed individuals opened fire on a police patrol in Zahedan, killing First Corporal Mohammad Reza Nezami Dost and wounding three others. Efforts to arrest the perpetrators are ongoing. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 塔斯尼姆通讯社：武装人员在扎黑丹向一支警察巡逻队开火，造成一等下士穆罕默德·礼萨·内扎米·多斯特死亡，另有三人受伤。逮捕肇事者的工作正在进行中。@wfwitness

text: ✝ The Maronite League Justifies Israel's Massacres: "The three-week extended truce between Israel and Hezbullah has become a fragile one, in light of the continued "use of the Lebanese arena for ends unrelated to Lebanon"!
text_zh: ✝ 马龙派联盟为以色列的大屠杀辩护：“鉴于继续‘将黎巴嫩舞台用于与黎巴嫩无关的目的’，以色列与真主党之间为期三周的延长停火已变得脆弱！”

text: Mali’s Leader Assimi Goïta: The situation is under control. The attacks were of “extreme gravity”. I promise the “complete neutralization” of those responsible. People should not to panic or fall into “division and national fracture.”
text_zh: 马里领导人阿西米·戈伊塔：局势已得到控制。袭击具有“极端严重性”。我承诺将对责任人进行“彻底消灭”。人们不应恐慌或陷入“分裂和国家破裂”。

text: New attacks in Baraachit The attack on a motorcycle in Kherbet Selem targeted a Lebanese soldier and his brother. A kill zone outside the Yellow zone
text_zh: 巴拉奇特发生新袭击。在赫尔贝特塞勒姆对一辆摩托车的袭击目标是一名黎巴嫩士兵及其兄弟。这是黄区外的一个杀戮区

text: ⚡️ 🇰🇵 🇺🇸 Bloomberg : North Korea’s nuclear arsenal is nearing a tipping point, potentially large enough to overwhelm the US ground‑based mid‑course defence system built at a cost of about $65 billion. Pyongyang now has an estimated 50 warheads and could produce fissile material for 12‑20 new bombs annually, putting it on a trajectory to rival France’s stockpile within a decade. The U.S. Defence Intelligence Agency estimates North Korea has only 10 ICBMs, but analysis of parade appearances suggests as many as 48 launchers. Solid‑fuel missiles like the Hwasong‑17, ‑18 and ‑19 are easier to conceal and faster to launch. While U.S. President Trump wages war in the Middle East to prevent Iran from acquiring a nuclear weapon, efforts to restrain Kim Jong Un have failed. The US‑led attack that killed Iran’s supreme leader has reinforced Pyongyang’s conviction that a robust nuclear deterrent is essential for regime survival. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇰🇵 🇺🇸 彭博社：朝鲜的核武库正接近一个临界点，其规模可能大到足以压倒耗资约650亿美元建立的美国陆基中段防御系统。平壤目前估计拥有50枚弹头，每年可生产足够制造12至20枚新核弹的裂变材料，这使其有望在十年内赶上法国的核储备。美国国防情报局估计朝鲜仅有10枚洲际弹道导弹，但对阅兵式上出现的导弹进行分析显示，其发射车数量可能多达48辆。像火星-17、火星-18和火星-19这样的固体燃料导弹更易于隐藏且发射速度更快。尽管美国总统特朗普在中东发动战争以阻止伊朗获得核武器，但遏制金正恩的努力却以失败告终。美国主导的击毙伊朗最高领袖的袭击行动，更加坚定了平壤的信念，即强大的核威慑对于政权生存至关重要。 @wfwitness

text: Since this morning, the Israeli army attacked various Lebanese towns and targeted vehicles in south Lebanon. They attacked: - Qabrikha - Baraashit - Qalawiya x2 - Majdal Zoun - Kafra - others etc They also murdered two trapped Hezbullah fighters in the yellow zone who were in a damaged struggle among only wiped-out rubble
text_zh: 自今天早上以来，以色列军队袭击了黎巴嫩的多个城镇，并针对黎巴嫩南部的车辆进行了打击。他们袭击了：- 卡布里哈（Qabrikha）- 巴拉希特（Baraashit）- 卡拉维亚（Qalawiya）x2 - 马杰达尔宗（Majdal Zoun）- 卡夫拉（Kafra）- 其他地区等。他们还杀害了黄区内两名被困的真主党武装人员，这些人当时正处于一片被彻底摧毁的废墟中进行艰难挣扎。

text: 🔄 Forwarded from АФРИКАРЬ: 📝 Держаться не стали 📝 Менака под контролем правительства Вчера вечером подразделения Африканского Корпуса провели патрулирование в Менаке , не выявив присутствия боевиков в городской черте. Вероятнее всего, радикалы из ИГ-Сахель не планировали всерьез удерживать город и покинули его спустя несколько часов после публикации громких заявлений о «захвате». 📌 Ситуация на севере Мали остается динамичной, а информационный фон — крайне противоречивым. Пока одни источники сообщают об успешной контратаке проправительственных ополченцев, другие приписывают решающую роль ударам авиации, которые заставили боевиков спешно ретироваться в пустыню. 📍 Онлайн-карты доступны по подписке на map.rybar.ru #Мали #Россия 💀 @rybar_africa — там, где политика горячее экватора 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 АФРИКАРЬ：📝 没能守住 📝 梅纳卡（Menaka）处于政府控制之下。昨晚，非洲军团（Africa Corps）的部队在梅纳卡进行了巡逻，未发现城区内有武装分子。最有可能的情况是，来自萨赫勒伊斯兰国（IS-Sahel）的激进分子并没有认真打算守住这座城市，在发布关于“占领”的响亮声明几小时后就离开了。📌 马里北部的局势依然动态变化，信息背景也极其矛盾。虽然一些消息来源报告称亲政府民兵进行了成功的反击，但另一些消息来源则将决定性作用归功于空袭，这些空袭迫使武装分子匆忙撤退到沙漠中。📍 在线地图可通过订阅 map.rybar.ru 获取 #马里 #俄罗斯 💀 @rybar_africa — 政治比赤道更火热的地方 💸 支持我们

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 ⚔️ President Volodymyr Zelensky announced plans to open arms exports: 🗣️ “Ukrainian companies will be given real access to partner-country markets, on the condition that our military is fully supplied with the weapons it needs first. We have proposed a special cooperation format to our partners — Drone Deals — covering the joint production and supply of drones, missiles, ammunition, and other in-demand military equipment, as well as software and integration solutions.” Video is generated by grok AI tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 ⚔️ 弗拉基米尔·泽连斯基总统宣布了开放武器出口的计划：🗣️ “在确保我们的军队首先获得所需武器的前提下，乌克兰企业将获得进入伙伴国家市场的真正准入权。我们已向合作伙伴提出了一种特殊的合作模式——‘无人机交易’（Drone Deals）——涵盖无人机、导弹、弹药及其他紧缺军事装备的联合生产与供应，以及软件和集成解决方案。” 视频由 Grok AI 生成 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 Mykhailo Fedorov: 🗣️ “We have tested a new type of FPV drone and are accelerating its delivery to the army. During trials, the drones covered distances of up to 25 km and successfully struck targets under various electronic warfare conditions. Some solutions fully met all objectives in environments closely resembling real combat conditions. We have already built the necessary system: 🔹 Simplified codification to shorten the path from development to the frontline; 🔹 Adjusted how requirements are formed — 80% of resources now go toward effective, battlefield-driven solutions, while 20% are focused on new technologies; 🔹 We conduct regular field testing together with Brave1.” Video is generated by grok AI tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 米哈伊洛·费多罗夫（Mykhailo Fedorov）：🗣️ “我们测试了一种新型 FPV 无人机，并正在加快其向军队的交付。在试验中，无人机覆盖了长达 25 公里的距离，并在各种电子战条件下成功打击了目标。一些解决方案在非常接近真实战斗环境的情况下完全达到了所有目标。我们已经建立了必要的系统：🔹 简化编码以缩短从开发到前线的路径；🔹 调整需求形成方式——80% 的资源现在用于有效的、战场驱动的解决方案，而 20% 专注于新技术；🔹 我们与 Brave1 一起进行定期的实地测试。” 视频由 Grok AI 生成 推文

text: WarFront Witness pinned a photo
text_zh: WarFront Witness 置顶了一张照片

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱🇦🇪🇶🇦🇴🇲 The Frozen Ticking Bomb: How Iran has won and lost the Iran War (P.2 / The victories – what Iran won) With the launch of Iranian strikes targeting the Gulf and the region entirely, for the first time in modern times since the era of the Arab…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇦🇪 🇶🇦 🇴🇲 The Frozen Ticking Bomb: How Iran has won and lost the Iran War (P.3 / The losses – why Iran has not truly won) Iran's attacks have also greatly damaged the oil and gas market, with all-time high prices comparable to those of the 2022 Russian invasion and the 1973 oil embargo of Saudi Arabia. Millions of barrels of oil have been lost in production, delivery, and supply, with analysts predicting a shortfall of oil commodities and goods. These gains might suggest a decisive Iranian win — but that would be incomplete. Iran's domestic industry has suffered great losses at the hands of mostly Israeli airstrikes, with Iran's steel industry suffering the most. Manufacturing industries in eastern Iran were also targeted, creating a supply shortage of many daily goods and materials. Not to mention Israeli strikes on Iranian petrochemical facilities, which will have a long-standing effect. Along with all this, steel and petrochemical exports — Iran's biggest non-oil revenue stream — have fully halted. Iranian government spokesperson Fatemeh Mohajerani announced the scale of the war's damages to Iran, stating that approximately 118,180 private properties have been damaged in the war, including 78,330 with minor damage, 29,187 with medium damage, 8,134 with severe damage, and 2,529 requiring full reconstruction, adding that reconstruction is expected to take between six months and two years. This comes as record-high inflation hits Iran, with Iranian analysts forecasting annual inflation of 49% in the best‑case deal scenario, 70% under the current status quo, and over 120% if war resumes. Iran's regional standing has also largely fallen, with Gulf-Iranian relations at an all-time low following Iranian attacks. A prominent example is the U.A.E.'s moves against Iran: the deployment of Iron Dome systems now in the UAE, and the possible gateway of more and more states joining the Abraham Accords. The current No War, No Peace stage of this conflict is also the most damaging to Iran. Even if Iran were winning militarily, this stalemate inflicts more economic pain than a ceasefire or a full Israeli victory would, because it keeps the country in a permanent low‑grade bleed. Exports have fallen from approximately 2 million barrels down to as low as 200,000–300,000, internal storage sites are filling up, revenue streams are damaged, and the country is in a shutdown losing millions every day. For now, Washington calculates that patience is cheaper than bombs — the U.S. finds itself in its most successful stage without firing another shot. Overall, with talks in deadlock and Iran suffering internally and externally, the U.S. does not necessarily need to restart war, as Iran has once again prepared — both narrative-wise and militarily. The "regime changed" Iranian government is one of unpredictability and uncertainty, more polarized than anything Iran has seen before, driving a stake at the delicate balance between reformists and principlists. That balance will be the ultimate decider. If reformists lose completely, the next Iranian government might restart the war on worse terms. But for now, the frozen bomb ticks on. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱🇦🇪🇶🇦🇴🇲 冻结的定时炸弹：伊朗如何赢得了伊朗战争又输掉了它（第二部分 / 胜利——伊朗赢得了什么）随着伊朗对海湾地区及整个区域发动袭击，这是自阿拉伯时代以来现代史上首次……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇦🇪 🇶🇦 🇴🇲 冻结的定时炸弹：伊朗如何赢得了伊朗战争又输掉了它（第三部分 / 损失——为什么伊朗并没有真正获胜）伊朗的袭击也严重损害了石油和天然气市场，价格创下历史新高，堪比 2022 年俄罗斯入侵和 1973 年沙特阿拉伯石油禁运时期。数百万桶石油在生产、运输和供应方面损失惨重，分析人士预测石油商品和货物将出现短缺。这些收益可能暗示伊朗取得了决定性的胜利——但这并不完整。伊朗国内工业在主要由以色列空袭造成的打击下遭受了巨大损失，其中伊朗钢铁工业受损最严重。伊朗东部的制造业也成为目标，导致许多日常商品和材料供应短缺。更不用说以色列对伊朗石化设施的打击，这将产生长期影响。除此之外，伊朗最大的非石油收入来源——钢铁和石化产品出口——已完全停止。伊朗政府发言人法特梅·莫哈杰拉尼（Fatemeh Mohajerani）宣布了战争对伊朗造成的损失规模，称战争中约有 118,180 处私人房产受损，其中 78,330 处轻微受损，29,187 处中度受损，8,134 处严重受损，2,529 处需要全面重建，并补充说重建预计需要六个月到两年时间。与此同时，创纪录的高通胀冲击了伊朗，伊朗分析人士预测，在最好的协议情况下年通胀率为 49%，在当前现状下为 70%，如果战争恢复则超过 120%。伊朗的地区地位也大幅下降，在伊朗发动袭击后，海湾国家与伊朗的关系降至历史最低点。一个突出的例子是阿联酋针对伊朗采取的行动：目前在阿联酋部署了“铁穹”系统，以及更多国家加入《亚伯拉罕协议》的潜在途径。这场冲突目前处于“不战不和”阶段，这对伊朗的伤害最大。即使伊朗在军事上获胜，这种僵局造成的经济痛苦也比停火或以色列全面胜利要大，因为它使国家处于长期的慢性失血状态。出口量已从约 200 万桶降至 20 万至 30 万桶，内部储存点已满，收入来源受损，国家处于停摆状态，每天损失数百万美元。目前，华盛顿计算出耐心比炸弹更便宜——美国发现自己处于最成功的阶段，而无需再开一枪。总的来说，随着谈判陷入僵局，伊朗在内部和外部都遭受痛苦，美国不一定需要重启战争，因为伊朗再次做好了准备——无论是在叙事上还是在军事上。“政权更迭”后的伊朗政府是一个不可预测和不确定的政府，比伊朗以往任何时候都更加两极分化，这给改革派和原则派之间的微妙平衡带来了风险。这种平衡将是最终的决定因素。如果改革派彻底失败，下一届伊朗政府可能会以更糟糕的条件重启战争。但目前，这枚冻结的炸弹仍在滴答作响。@wfwitness
